summary: Reviewed the delivered project persistence implementation against the proposal, design, and project-data delta spec. Confirmed remote-backed CRUD, version/message persistence, per-user legacy migration, explicit async UI states, and ledger traceability match the intended scope; AI generation remains mock by design.
